title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A small organization with changing intake and fulfillment processes. Maintainers need a typed, tested domain core with replaceable storage and bounded workflow extensions. Planned artifact: Deliver Extensible Community Workflow Capstone with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate domain rules, application orchestration, infrastructure adapters, and user interface concerns with explicit dependencies.
Use domain services only for cohesive rules that do not naturally belong to one entity or value object.
Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
